Corps vertebraux aplatis, type I plus severe
Os longs incurves en type I, droits en type II
Small thorax mentionne, moins severe que thanatophore
Vertebral bodies slightly flat en periode neonatale
Hearing loss si otites recurrentes non traitees
Mild, associated with temporal lobe dysgenesis

diseases.disease_name: Osteogenese imparfaite type IIA (letal, os epais)

phenotypes.notes: Small thorax, short thick ribs with continuous beading
Generalized loss of height vertebral bodies
Small, low-set ears with prominent crus

Anomalies SNC partagees avec type I
Hitchhiker thumb, proximally set and abducted
Short extremities at birth or later
Progressive renal disease, peut etre tardif
Short iliac bones, trident acetabular roofs
Low iliac wings, hook-like acetabular protrusion
Bluish sclerae at birth, white later
Bowing of femora and tibiae, pretibial skin dimples
Small bell-shaped thorax with 11 pairs of ribs
Sex reversal in most chromosomal males
Wide sutures, delayed closure anterior fontanel
Partial to total absence clavicles, bilateral
Broad thumbs and great toes, radially deviated
Short pudgy hands, distalward progressive shortness
Narrow thorax due to short ribs in younger children
Coarse face, prominent forehead, puffy cheeks
Pattern radiographique caracteristique: cotes larges, ilia hypoplasiques, vertebres en crochet
Short tubular bones, proximal tapering metacarpals
Extremites courtes, trunk long a  la naissance
Crescent-shaped iliac crests, hypoplastic basilar ilia
Cleft uvula and/or palate in about 50%
Punctate calcifications ends long bones, carpals, tarsals
Flat face, extremely depressed nasal bridge in infancy
Punctate epiphyses ends long bones, disappear 1-3 ans
Coronal clefts vertebral bodies best seen infancy
Poor/absent ossification vertebral bodies, skip lesions
Irregular metaphyseal ossification defects into diaphyses
Small scapulae, small pelvic bones with indentations
Fetal face, hypertelorism, depressed nasal bridge
Wide phenotypic spectrum, hydrops frequent dans forme severe
Hurler phenotype neonatal: paupieres epaisses, ensellure nasale
Periosteal cloaking en periode neonatale, pathognomonique
Absent ossification pedicles et neural arches
Extreme micromelia, perte orientation longitudinale os
Absent/severely retarded, cobra sign en AP

Club foot deformity, inward rotation consistent

Prominent eyes, long upper lip, micrognathia
Short extremities, tibiae ovoid shorter than fibulae
Fractures with increased density metaphyseal margins
Failure to thrive despite accelerated maturation
Prominent forehead, shallow orbits, depressed nasal bridge
Coarse facial features des la naissance
Short stature des la naissance, contrairement a  Hurler
Punctate calcifications suivant depots calciques in utero
Short AP diameter vertebral bodies, hook configuration
Ipsilateral limb defects, amelia to mild hypoplasia
Thin dense tubular bones with abrupt metaphyseal flare
Short limbs, broad hands, stick-like bones
Short and broad ilia, horizontal acetabular roofs
